purpose: Consolidate catalog asset roles, publish workflow, and admin UX into production-ready state

phases.name: Asset Role Consolidation
phases.description: Enforce explicit asset role usage everywhere (no images[0] fallbacks)

tasks.title: Audit all components for images[0] usage
tasks.description: Search codebase for array index access on images; document all instances

tasks.title: Fix WrapCard to use explicit hero role
tasks.description: Update components/catalog/WrapCard.tsx to resolve hero image by role, not images[0]

tasks.title: Fix WrapDetail gallery to use gallery role
Update getCatalogWraps fetcher to resolve hero role
tasks.description: lib/fetchers/catalog: select hero image explicitly by kind='hero'

tasks.title: Add E2E test for hero image resolution
tasks.description: Test: wrap with multiple images displays correct hero

phases.name: Publish Readiness Flow
phases.description: Implement and validate publish readiness gates with user-facing guidance

tasks.title: Implement publishWrap() action with validation
tasks.description: Create lib/actions/catalog/publish.ts with hero + visualizer_texture checks

tasks.title: Add publish-readiness UI indicator
tasks.description: Show checklist in WrapManager: hero ✓, texture ✓, categories ✓, name ✓

tasks.title: Add publish button + confirmation
tasks.description: WrapManager detail: publish button only enabled when ready

tasks.title: Test publish workflow E2E
tasks.description: Create wrap → upload hero → upload texture → publish → verify in catalog

phases.name: Admin Form Consolidation
phases.description: Unify and simplify catalog manager forms

tasks.title: Consolidate WrapForm (current: multiple ad-hoc forms)
tasks.description: Create single WrapForm component using React Hook Form + Zod for all fields

tasks.title: Test WrapForm with all fields
tasks.description: Create wrap with all fields, update, verify validation

phases.name: Cache Validation
phases.description: Verify cache invalidation works for all mutations

tasks.title: Test: createWrap invalidates catalog:wraps
tasks.description: Create wrap → verify getCatalogWraps returns new data (not stale cache)

tasks.title: Test: updateWrapImage invalidates wrap detail
tasks.description: Upload image → verify detail page reflects new asset

notes: Catalog is foundation for visualizer; complete this first
Asset roles must be enforced before visualizer work begins
Publish workflow is critical for storefront credibility
acceptance_criteria: All components use explicit asset roles (no images[0])
Publish validation includes hero + visualizer_texture checks
Admin form unified and using React Hook Form + Zod
E2E tests cover: browse → detail → manage → publish → verify
